notes:
BDO Multi-Tool v0.9

- Added the Grind Tracker session workflow with per-spot totals, average silver per hour, trash per hour, class display, Agris, and session modifiers.
- Added EU grind item price caching and Arsha market-price support for grind drop values.
- Improved grind-zone item/icon presentation, class icons, saved-session tables, and modifier icon alignment.
- Added global loot screenshot scanning improvements for inventory screenshots and stricter item matching.
- Hid the experimental Garmoth import entry point until it is ready for regular use.
